reviews.comment:
Todo limpio.  Buena comida aunque un poco caro. Excelente atención de todo el personal. La entrada y salida a la ruta son complicadas.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was clean. The food was good, although a bit pricey. Excellent service from all the staff. Getting in and out of the road is difficult.
